stemHtml: An aircraft is flying on an East Track of 090°. The pilot is in contact with ATC at a distant destination aerodrome via the HF communication radio. Ten minutes after sunset, the pilot loses contact. What happened?

options.a: The skywave interferes with the surface wave into a dead space.
options.b: The aircraft has entered the skip zone between the skywave and the surface wave.
options.c: The aircraft is no longer receiving the surface wave.
options.d: The night effect prevents reception of the sky wave.
